positive: A stylized, abstract geometric owl perched on a single branch. The owl's silhouette is rendered in crisp black negative space against a vibrant, complementary teal and coral gradient background. The geometric patterns forming the owl incorporate minimalist shapes and interconnected lines. Composition is centered and highly symmetrical, ensuring strong graphic impact. The style is modern linocut meets mid-century brutalism, favoring clean vectors and strong contrasts. Lighting is even and flat, optimized for textile printing, with minimal gradients for maximum visibility. The composition should maintain enough white/negative space to allow for easy crop and apparel placement. Aspect ratio must be square.
negative: blurry, text, logo, signature, dirty, smudged, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, watermarks, photorealistic, 3D render, messy, gradient background bleed
